description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest), Python versions (3.8, 3.11, 3.12), Sphinx versions (dev, 4, 5, 6, 7, default), and distributions (pip, mamba, minimal). For each job, check out the repository, set up a headless display, install Python and dependencies using pip or micromamba, and run tests with pytest and Sphinx.
